positive: A highly detailed, symmetrical mandala design featuring stylized celestial elements mixed with lush, tropical bioluminescent flora. Central composition with strong, clean silhouettes of exotic flowers and glowing nebulae patterns. Use deep indigo, emerald green, copper, and soft cyan for a high-contrast, vaporwave-inspired palette. The style should emulate intricate woodblock printing meets cosmic art, with perfect, razor-sharp edges and negative space emphasis. Vector art aesthetic, perfect for seamless fabric repeat, centered and highly detailed.
negative: blur, watermark, text, signature, low resolution, noise, grain, artifacts, bad anatomy, extra limbs, deformed, out of frame, realistic photo, cartoon, messy, asymmetrical
